tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(let [in-progress (linear_issues {:state "in_progress"})
      by-assignee (group-by :assignee in-progress)
      counts (map (fn [[person issues]] {:person person :count (count issues)}) by-assignee)
      top (apply max-key :count counts)]
  {:person (:person top) :count (:count top)})"}
